meta.title: Mythos — Learn Greek Mythology Daily
meta.description: A calm, collectible daily app for learning Greek mythology — gods, heroes, monsters, and myths in under three minutes.

today.title: Today's lesson
today.subtitleWeekday: One myth at a time. Under three minutes.
today.subtitleWeekend: Weekends are for review — browse the archive or revisit favorites.
today.streakActive: {count, plural, one {# weekday in a row} other {# weekdays in a row}}
today.streakEmpty: Complete a lesson on a weekday to start your streak.
today.emptyBody: Add lessons in Sanity Studio, or run the seed script for Week 1 samples.
today.weekendReview: No new lesson on weekends — perfect time to explore the archive.
today.caughtUpBody: You've finished every unlocked lesson. Revisit the archive or wait for the next one to unlock.
today.caughtUpShort: All unlocked lessons complete — next one unlocks soon.

archive.title: Archive
archive.subtitle: {released} lessons unlocked · {locked} still to come
archive.empty: No lessons in the archive yet.
archive.noResults: No lessons match your search or filters.

explore.title: Explore
explore.subtitle: Characters, places, and concepts from the myths.
explore.empty: Add characters in Studio to populate Explore.
explore.noCharacters: No characters yet. Add them in Studio.
explore.noConcepts: No concepts yet. Add them in Studio.
explore.noPlaces: No places yet. Add them in Studio.

progress.title: Progress
progress.subtitle: Your streaks and completed lessons are saved on this device.
progress.streakHint: Complete at least one lesson each weekday. Weekends don't break your streak.
progress.streakEmpty: Mark a lesson as read on a weekday to begin.
progress.localNote: Progress is stored locally in your browser — not synced across devices.

settings.title: Settings
settings.subtitle: Preferences and installation.
settings.installBody: Add Mythos to your iPhone home screen for a native, offline-ready experience.
settings.progressBody: Completed lessons, favorites, and streaks are stored on this device only.
settings.clearProgressConfirm: Clear all completed lessons, favorites, and streak data on this device?

install.title: Install Mythos
install.subtitle: Get daily mythology lessons from your home screen.
install.step1: Open Mythos in Safari on your iPhone.
install.step2: Tap the Share button at the bottom of the screen.
install.step4: Tap "Add" — Mythos will appear like a native app.
install.footer: After installing, lessons you have opened stay available offline (Phase 4 expands caching).
